## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `type/short-description` (e.g. `feat/redaction-engine`).
- [ ] PR title is written as a Conventional Commit (`type(scope): summary`) — it becomes the squashed commit message.
- [ ] `yarn typecheck` passes locally.
- [ ] `yarn format` has been run (or `yarn format:check` passes).
- [ ] `yarn test:run` passes locally; new behavior has tests where practical.
- [ ] No unrelated changes are bundled into this PR.

> This repo uses **squash merge only**. Your commits will be squashed into a single commit using the PR title and body, and the branch will be deleted on merge.
